business.name: Total Pest Control South Dallas
business.tagline: Dallas’s Trusted Pest Defense – Safe, Fast, & Local

seo.title: Total Pest Control South Dallas | Expert Pest Exterminator in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Total Pest Control South Dallas provides safe, effective pest control in Dallas, TX. Get rid of ants, roaches, rodents & more. Free estimate, same-day service. Call (469) 301-7802.

hero.headline: Protect Your Dallas Home from Pests – Fast & Reliable
hero.subheadline: From ants to rodents, our local experts eliminate infestations with eco-friendly methods. Same-day service, free quotes, and 100% satisfaction guaranteed.

featureSections.title: Total Protection for Your Property
featureSections.body: We treat every crawlspace, corner, and crack to ensure pests don't return. Our Integrated Pest Management (IPM) approach targets the source, not just the symptoms.
bullets: Eco-friendly treatments safe for kids & pets
Targeted solutions for ants, roaches, spiders, rodents & more
featureSections.cardBody: A single scout ant can lead an entire colony into your kitchen. Our barrier treatments stop them before they settle in.

featureSections.title: We Respond When You Need Us Most
featureSections.body: Pests don't wait, and neither should you. Our team offers flexible scheduling, including same-day appointments for urgent infestations.
bullets: No contracts required for one-time treatments
featureSections.cardBody: If pests return between scheduled treatments, we'll re-treat at no extra cost. Your peace of mind is our priority.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas pests and Dallas weather. Our treatments are tailored to the specific challenges of North Texas homes.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured Professionals
whyChooseUs.description: Every technician undergoes rigorous training and background checks. You can trust the person entering your home.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing – No Hidden Fees
whyChooseUs.description: You'll know the cost upfront. No surprise charges, no upsells – just honest, effective pest control.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly Options Available
whyChooseUs.description: We offer green treatments that are tough on pests but gentle on your family, pets, and the environment.

testimonials.quote: Total Pest Control saved us from a massive roach problem. The technician was punctual, explained everything, and the treatment worked immediately.
testimonials.author: Maria H.

testimonials.quote: I called in a panic about ants in my kitchen. They came out the same day and solved the issue. Fair price, great service.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: We've used them for quarterly treatments for two years. Never a pest issue. Reliable and friendly team.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready for a Pest-Free Home?
cta.subheadline: Get your free inspection and estimate today. No obligation, just results.

servicesPage.intro: From common household pests to stubborn infestations, Total Pest Control South Dallas offers targeted treatments that work. Explore our services below and find the perfect solution for your home.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Eliminate ants, roaches, spiders, and more with our comprehensive treatment plans.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control service covers the most common invaders in Dallas homes. We use a combination of baits, sprays, and exclusion techniques to create a protective barrier around your property. Regular maintenance plans keep pests away year-round.
benefits: Targets ants, roaches, silverfish, earwigs, and spiders
Flexible scheduling – monthly, quarterly, or one-time

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your home to identify pest entry points, nesting areas, and the extent of the infestation.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: Our technician applies targeted treatments to baseboards, cracks, and exterior perimeter. We focus on high-traffic areas.

process.title: Prevention
process.description: We seal gaps, provide recommendations, and schedule follow-ups to ensure pests don't return.

faqs.question: How long does a treatment take?
faqs.answer: Most general pest treatments take 20–40 minutes, depending on the size of your home and severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Is it safe for my pets?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets once dry. We'll advise you on any precautions.

services.title: Rodent Control & Exclusion
services.shortDescription: Remove mice and rats and prevent them from coming back with our exclusion services.
services.longDescription: Rodents can cause structural damage and spread disease. Our rodent control program includes trapping, baiting, and full exclusion – sealing every hole and gap larger than a dime. We also clean and sanitize affected areas.
benefits: Full home exclusion – seal entry points

process.title: Inspection & Assessment
process.description: We locate rodent activity, droppings, gnaw marks, and potential entry points inside and outside your home.

process.title: Trapping & Baiting
process.description: We place tamper-resistant bait stations and traps in safe, strategic locations to eliminate the population.

process.title: Exclusion & Prevention
process.description: We seal all entry points with steel wool, caulk, and heavy-duty materials, then provide ongoing monitoring.

faqs.question: How long does rodent exclusion take?
faqs.answer: Exclusion typically takes 1–2 days depending on the size of the home and number of entry points.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a 30-day warranty on rodent exclusion. If you see signs of rodents within that period, we'll return at no charge.

services.title: Termite Control & Prevention
services.shortDescription: Protect your home from termite damage with advanced detection and treatment.
services.longDescription: Termites cause billions in damage each year. Our termite services include thorough inspections, liquid soil treatments, and baiting systems. We identify early signs of infestation and create a customized protection plan for your property.
benefits: Liquid barrier and bait station options

process.title: Termite Inspection
process.description: We examine your foundation, crawlspace, attic, and wood structures for mud tubes, frass, and damage.

process.title: Treatment Plan
process.description: Based on the inspection, we recommend either a liquid termiticide barrier or a Sentricon bait system.

process.title: Installation & Monitoring
process.description: We apply the treatment or install bait stations, then schedule regular monitoring to ensure effectiveness.

faqs.question: How often should I get a termite inspection?
faqs.answer: We recommend an annual termite inspection for all homeowners, especially in termite-prone areas like Dallas.

faqs.question: Is termite treatment safe for my garden?
faqs.answer: Yes, our treatments are targeted and minimize impact on soil and plants. We take care to protect your landscaping.

services.title: Bed Bug Heat Treatment
services.shortDescription: Kill bed bugs at all life stages with our non-chemical heat treatment.
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are resilient, but heat doesn't lie. Our heat treatment raises the temperature in your home to over 135°F, killing bed bugs and their eggs in one day. No chemicals, no fumes, no hassle. We also offer canine inspections for detection.
benefits: 100% chemical-free – safe for families and pets
Kills bed bugs and eggs in a single treatment
No need to throw away furniture
Canine inspection available for accurate detection

process.title: Preparation & Inspection
process.description: We guide you on preparing your home, then conduct a thorough inspection using K-9 detection if needed.

process.title: Heat Treatment
process.description: Industrial heaters raise the temperature to lethal levels. We monitor sensors throughout the process to ensure even heating.

process.title: Post-Treatment Verification
process.description: After cooling, we inspect again to confirm elimination and provide tips to prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: How long does heat treatment take?
faqs.answer: The entire process typically takes 6–8 hours, plus a few hours for setup and breakdown.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave during treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, you and your pets must vacate during the heat treatment. We'll coordinate a convenient time.

about.headline: Your Neighbors, Your Pest Control Experts
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with safe, effective, and affordable pest control solutions delivered with honesty and respect.
story: Total Pest Control South Dallas was founded in 2010 by a team of local pest management professionals who saw a need for reliable, customer-focused service in the southern Dallas area. Starting with just one truck and a commitment to doing the job right, we grew through word-of-mouth and a reputation for showing up on time, communicating clearly, and solving problems permanently.

Today, we serve hundreds of homes across Dallas County. We're proud to be a family-owned business that treats every customer like a neighbor. Our technicians live and work in the communities they serve, so they understand the unique pest pressures of North Texas. We invest in ongoing training, eco-friendly products, and the latest equipment to deliver results you can trust.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest assessments, transparent pricing, and never recommend services you don't need.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We set high standards for training, equipment, and customer service. Every job is done right.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to support local schools, sports teams, and neighborhood events. Dallas is our home too.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We stay ahead of the curve with the latest pest control technology and eco-friendly methods.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Pest Control Estimate
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form below. We'll respond within 24 hours.
